name: Asian Gravlox with Chayote Caviar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop or puree 4 stalks lemongrass.
2. Add 6 leaves kaffir lime to the mixture and pulse until combined.
3. Mix in 1 cup shallots, 1/2 cup peeled ginger, 1/2 cup ground, toasted coriander, 1/2 cup ground, toasted star anise, 1/4 cup ground, toasted Szechwan peppercorns, 1/2 cup ground, toasted fennel, and 1/2 cup ground, toasted white peppercorns.
4. Combine with 2 cups kosher salt and 2 cups sugar in a bowl.
5. Remove the skin from one side of salmon and place it in the mixture, ensuring both sides are completely coated.
6. Cover tightly and refrigerate for at least 16 hours.
7. After chilling, thoroughly rub off the cure.
8. Slice the salmon very thin on the bias.
(Note: The recipe contains no ingredients listed.)
